title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO LICO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAVAL, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BARRIO BILBAO.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3499 / 57 OG No. 8, 1376 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2830, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO LICO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAVAL, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BARRIO BILBAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Lico in the Municipality of Naval, Province of Leyte, is hereby changed to Barrio Bilbao.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
